cultural_scroll.title: Find and read a Cultural Scroll (mob drop or loot chest)

subtitle.text: Every civilization left one. Most of them are still there.

description: Sixteen cultural food traditions exist in this world.
Each one a scroll. Each one an answer.
Cultural Scrolls are lore books — flavor text, not research items.
They drop from mobs and appear in loot chests.
Village chests. Ruins. Desert and jungle temples.
Read them. They tell you who was here before you.
They also tell you what you are walking toward.
→ Find and read a Cultural Scroll [check]
